description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The facade features a combination of white and wood-textured panels, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels, allowing for ample natural light. The front entryway is recessed and flanked by two symmetrical trees, with a straight walkway leading up to double doors. The side and rear elevations are more private, with fewer and smaller windows, and the wood paneling continues around the structure. The house appears to have multiple rooms, visible through the transparent windows, and includes contemporary furnishings. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, geometric lines, and a blend of natural and synthetic materials.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, wood and white panel exterior, and large windows. The design is clean and geometric, with a prominent front entry and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, wood and white panel facade, and two decorative trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood panel exterior, limited window openings, and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid wood panel wall and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the wood paneling and the house's rectangular footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed double doors with a straight walkway, flanked by symmetrical trees and minimal decorative elements
